summary.en: NEPRA regulates Pakistan electricity activities such as licensing, tariff, monitoring, and consumer-protection matters. A BESS project should first classify its role: behind-the-meter backup, solar-plus-storage, merchant storage, utility asset, mini-grid, wheeling, or ancillary-service asset can lead to different NEPRA, utility, tariff, metering, and dispatch treatment.
summary.zh: NEPRA监管巴基斯坦电力活动，包括许可、关税、电力监测和消费者保护等事项。BESS项目应先界定自身角色：表后备用、光储、独立储能、电网侧资产、微电网、输电/转供或辅助服务资产可能导致不同的NEPRA、电网、关税、计量和调度处理。
summary.zht: NEPRA監管巴基斯坦電力活動，包括許可、關稅、電力監測和消費者保護等事項。BESS項目應先界定自身角色：表後備用、光儲、獨立儲能、電網側資產、微電網、輸電／轉供或輔助服務資產可能導致不同的NEPRA、電網、關稅、計量和調度處理。

standards_or_laws: Regulation of Generation, Transmission and Distribution of Electric Power Act, 1997
NEPRA licensing, tariff, monitoring, and regulatory framework as applicable to the project role

summary.en: China grid approvals and GB-standard system reports do not create a NEPRA approval. They can support a technical file only after the Pakistan commercial and regulatory role is defined.
summary.zh: 中国并网批复和GB-standard系统报告不能形成NEPRA批准。只有在巴基斯坦商业和监管角色明确后，它们才能支持技术资料。
summary.zht: 中國併網批覆和GB-standard系統報告不能形成NEPRA批准。只有在巴基斯坦商業和監管角色明確後，它們才能支持技術資料。

gap.en: Confirm whether the BESS is equipment only, a customer backup system, a generation or supply asset, or a grid-service resource before assuming whether NEPRA approval is mandatory or project-specific.
gap.zh: 在判断NEPRA批准是否强制或仅为项目特定要求前，应确认BESS是单纯设备、用户备用系统、发电或供电资产，还是电网服务资源。
gap.zht: 在判斷NEPRA批准是否強制或僅為項目特定要求前，應確認BESS是單純設備、用戶備用系統、發電或供電資產，還是電網服務資源。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS performs a regulated electricity activity requiring NEPRA licence, registration, tariff, approval, dispatch, or metering treatment; project-specific for purely customer-side equipment
mandatory_status.cn: China grid approval obligations depend on project type, voltage level, market role, and grid-connection contract

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Determine the Pakistan electricity-market role of the BESS before claiming a NEPRA licence, tariff, or approval requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在声称需要NEPRA许可证、关税或批准前，应先确定BESS在巴基斯坦电力市场中的角色。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在聲稱需要NEPRA許可證、關稅或批准前，應先確定BESS在巴基斯坦電力市場中的角色。

requirement_topic.en: Utility Interconnection, Grid-Code Review, and Site Commissioning
requirement_topic.zh: 电网公司并网、电网规范审查和现场调试
requirement_topic.zht: 電網公司併網、電網規範審查和現場調試

summary.en: A grid-connected Pakistan BESS should be reviewed with the relevant distribution company, transmission company, or project grid operator for protection, metering, anti-islanding, fault ride-through, voltage/frequency limits, harmonics, communications, dispatch, and commissioning tests. Pakistan and China both use 50 Hz systems, but voltage level, grounding, protection philosophy, utility settings, grid strength, ambient conditions, and communications remain site-specific.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦并网BESS应与相关配电公司、输电公司或项目电网运营方审查保护、计量、防孤岛、故障穿越、电压/频率限值、谐波、通信、调度和调试测试。巴基斯坦和中国均使用50Hz系统，但电压等级、接地、保护理念、电网整定、电网强度、环境条件和通信仍需按场址确认。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦併網BESS應與相關配電公司、輸電公司或項目電網營運方審查保護、計量、防孤島、故障穿越、電壓／頻率限值、諧波、通信、調度和調試測試。巴基斯坦和中國均使用50Hz系統，但電壓等級、接地、保護理念、電網整定、電網強度、環境條件和通信仍需按場址確認。

standards_or_laws: Pakistan grid code and utility interconnection requirements where applicable

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence is useful because the frequency basis is similar, but China settings are not a Pakistan interconnection approval. PCS firmware, transformer taps, earthing, relay settings, harmonic limits, HVAC derating, SCADA, and remote monitoring should be validated for the Pakistan point of connection.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023系统证据有帮助，因为频率基础相近，但中国整定不是巴基斯坦并网批准。应针对巴基斯坦接入点验证PCS固件、变压器分接、接地、继电保护整定、谐波限值、暖通降额、SCADA和远程监控。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023系統證據有幫助，因為頻率基礎相近，但中國整定不是巴基斯坦併網批准。應針對巴基斯坦接入點驗證PCS韌體、變壓器分接、接地、繼電保護整定、諧波限值、暖通降額、SCADA和遠端監控。

gap.en: Merged former grid-5 into grid-2: produce Pakistan-specific relay settings, grid model, power-quality study, short-circuit study, SCADA protocol, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records.
gap.zh: 已将原grid-5并入grid-2：应制作巴基斯坦特定继电保护整定、电网模型、电能质量研究、短路研究、SCADA协议、调试计划和现场验收记录。
gap.zht: 已將原grid-5併入grid-2：應製作巴基斯坦特定繼電保護整定、電網模型、電能品質研究、短路研究、SCADA協議、調試計劃和現場驗收記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where utility interconnection, grid-code, EPC, owner, insurer, or commissioning approval applies; details are project and connection-point specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (NEPRA) — legal and code documents page; utility-specific interconnection documents must be obtained for the project

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China grid report is not a Pakistan interconnection approval. The 50 Hz match helps engineering review but does not remove site-specific utility commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国并网报告不是巴基斯坦并网批准。50Hz一致有助于工程审查，但不能免除场址特定的电网公司调试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國併網報告不是巴基斯坦併網批准。50Hz一致有助於工程審查，但不能免除場址特定的電網公司調試。
